Hi, I'm new to the game and I'm not really sure how team building works in this game. Any recommendations based on my blue team so far?

Take Corpo as main dps, Goliath, Sanga and Ramona as supports. With the wheels, just read what a unit does and then give that unit fitting wheels, for example titan always goes onto your dps unit, her corpo

Also, put the R wheels Emerge, Frenzy and Greed onto your support units, one each. They will carry you through arc 1, and with arc 2 you will know what you are doing. Also, SR and R wheels are equally good, you just gotta understand what is the most useful for you

Hi everyone! Some of you have known me from my help requests in the English Channel.

Basically, I am very new this game, and would like some teambuilding help so that I can learn the mechanics. 

Also, what are your recommendations for pulling right now?

Then I can only give you a brief introduction: 
1. Chaos: the simplest can assist and harm. 
2. Deep Sea: the character needs to have everything well-equipped. 
3. Flesh and Blood: requires a lot of money and important damage and support are limited to specific characters. 
4. Hyperdimensional: a field that heavily relies on character understanding and familiarity; if you don't know how to play, no matter how high your awakening is, it will still be terrible.
I need a suggestion to build a team please.

Corpo as main dps (unit top left), and the other 3 units around her as support, so Hameln, Sanga and Goliath. You could also try to change Goliath to Murphy (top right) and if it works better then just ditch Goliath
Sanga and Goliath over Aurita/Tulu?
Yes
Absolutely

Tulu gives temporary buffs which is useless (temp stuff sucks in general) and Aurita play around Gland Division which isn’t a good card so her kit ain’t it (also Corpo is your dps you don’t need Aurita trying to be one as well) and her Power of Friendship card just redraws your hand which isn’t good since you should build a team where everybody is useful
Right and which wheels should I use?
What do you got
for general wheel assigning you just look at what your unit does aka the cards, then look for a wheel that interacts with said mechanic
can you also show the info of the wheel next to this one cus I havent seen that one yet
also, level up your wheels lmao

but for starters, run titan on the main dps, unseen on a support and the R wheels Frenzy, Greed and Emerge on the 3 support units
also, SR and R wheels may have a different grading in the game, but both are equally important and it just comes down to you being able to make the most of them so dont go and ignore R wheels

Big brother, you want to play in the deep sea. 
I want to give you a few suggestions.
1. You need a full set of characters to play in the deep sea.
2. High awakening is not necessary for the deep sea.
3. Typically, having all three awakenings is already a high configuration for regular players.
4. Also, if you only want to play in the deep sea, I suggest you could draw for another Chaos domain.

There were very few resources in the early stage,
so let's practice with this team first.
The main damage is stacking armor and then unleashing coral bursts or counterattacks.
Your teaching

Titan is the best dps wheel rn, and there is a mechanic where you can only equip one SSR wheel per unit UNLESS one of those SSR wheels is +12. So Titan will probably be your first +12, but I advise to pull for good units from standard banner first (you can refer to his tier list as to what is good or not) and then pull for it as it will take a very long time to +12 that wheel and early on that mechanic with the +12 wheels doesn’t even help you as you will be clearing the content even without that mechanic so I would focus on getting units at the start

As for a team, I suggest trying Caecus as main dps (top left unit), Sanga (bottom right), Nautila (top right) and Ramona (right middle) as supports. The team is kinda eh and I would recommend to pull for Hameln and Horla on the current banner, also if you feel that the team ain’t working try to switch units from yellow n blue around
Like trying to throw Goliath in could work if the current team doesn’t feel right

I just started yesterday and need guidance on which characters to prioritize and invest in, as I don’t want to waste resources. 

Here the list of the chars that I own:
Also suggest me a teamcomp <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

General rule early on: Only pull for blue realm on standard banner
Also, for the banner with the 3 units, you should pull all 3 of em, Horla and Hameln are top tier supports and Corpo is also a really good dps unit.
If this is all you currently got then Jenkin as the main dps, winkle, Ramona and Lotan as support, tho if you swap out a unit then it’s def lotan cus she is kinda bad but the rest of the units that you got all suck equally
For the standard wheel banner, pull for Titan, it’s the best dps wheel rn so try to get a good blue team and then get 1 copy of titan for your dps
